The light made the weathered, peeling white paint of the wooden planks glow, and I loved how the dark green roof stood out against the clear blue sky. A tall, slender antenna rose up behind the barn, adding a curious modern touch to the rustic scene. The bare branches of the trees framed the top of the photo, creating a natural feel, and I could just make out hints of a fenced area and perhaps some animals on the right. It was such a

photos.caption: Abandoned Kmart — How do you manage to leave your pants behind?
photos.captionKii: I remember taking this photo of a really long, empty corridor or walkway that felt quite desolate. On the right, there was a stark white brick wall stretching into the distance, with what looked like boarded-up windows or entrances covered in plywood. On the left, a series of sturdy white pillars supported the overhead roof, creating a deep shadow over the path. The ground was concrete or asphalt, showing some cracks, and right in the foreground, there was this dark piece of clothing, perhaps a jacket or pants, just lying there, adding to the sense of abandonment. The clear sky was visible at

photos.caption: Breakfast — Goat kid taking a drink
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this sweet interaction between a mother goat and her kid. The adult goat, with its pristine white fur and a small brass bell around its neck, was standing attentively, while its little one was positioned right underneath, its rear end visible as it either nursed or just stayed close. They were in what looked like a muddy pen or a dirt-covered enclosure, with hints of a wire fence in the background. The sunlight was catching their coats, making them stand out against the darker ground. It was such a tender, natural moment that I felt compelled to capture, showcasing a bit of f

photos.caption: Turkey Egg — Turkey egg
photos.captionKii: I remember closely examining this really interesting egg. It had such a beautiful, delicate beige color, heavily speckled with these small, darker brown spots all over its surface, which made it quite unique. The egg itself was perfectly ovoid, smooth, and rested gently on what looks like a simple white paper towel, highlighting its natural beauty and texture. I think I wanted to capture the intricate details of its shell; it almost looks like a little piece of art found in nature. It wasn't just any ordinary egg.

photos.caption: Julient with a root — Jule's playing fetch, she brought an old stalk back
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing my dog happily bounding across the grassy field, absolutely focused on the sturdy stick she'd found. Her ears were flapping back slightly with the motion, and you could just tell by her posture and the way she held the stick that she was completely in her element, enjoying every moment of playtime outdoors. The sunlight was hitting her glossy black fur just right, and the simple green of the field with some trees in the background made for such a classic, joyful dog moment. It's always so wonderful to see her so content and active.

photos.caption: Round barn in Rochester, red extraction — A picture across the golf courser.  The round barn now holds the proshop for the city course.
photos.captionKii: I remember taking this really striking photo of that incredible round red barn. It really stood out against the almost monochrome landscape, which I think I intentionally made black and white to emphasize its vibrant color. The bare trees around it and in the foreground framed the scene perfectly, giving it a somewhat stark, artistic feel, perhaps captured in late winter or early spring. There was a winding path leading up to the barn, inviting exploration. It was such a unique structure, and I loved how its bright red paint just popped.

photos.caption: New Zealand Sunset — Sunset on the beach near Hokitika
photos.captionKii: I remember standing on the beach and capturing this absolutely spectacular sunset. The sky was just ablaze with the most incredible golden and orange hues, with rays of sunlight bursting through the clouds and fanning out across the horizon. It felt so dramatic and powerful. The clouds themselves were tinged with these beautiful warm colors, creating such a dynamic backdrop as the sun dipped towards the ocean. The sea below was a dark, rich blue, reflecting some of that light, with gentle waves rolling onto what looks like a dark, wet sand beach. It was such a breathtaking moment, feeling the

photos.caption: Sunshine coast — Looking out towards town
photos.captionKii: I remember this beautiful, somewhat misty scene from the beach. The sky was completely overcast, giving everything a soft, muted light, and there was a bit of a hazy atmosphere, especially looking towards the distant headland. You can clearly see a cluster of buildings and that distinct lighthouse perched on the hill in the distance. The vast expanse of the sandy beach stretches out, with patterns left by the receding tide, and off in the mid-distance, a lone person is walking, really emphasizing the scale of the coastline. It felt like such a peaceful and calming moment, just taking in the gr

photos.caption: Surfing, kinda — Guy learning to surf
photos.captionKii: I remember this exciting moment at the beach, watching someone expertly riding a small wave on what looks like a skimboard or a very small surfboard. The ocean was a beautiful deep blue and green, with the white foam of the waves breaking around him. He was leaning into the wave, showing really good balance. The sky was a bit overcast that day, with soft, light clouds, which gave the water a lovely muted light. It was such a fun, active day by the sea, and I loved capturing the energy of the water sports.

photos.caption: Fall Maple Leaf — Back lit maple leaf
photos.captionKii: I remember spotting this gorgeous, vibrant orange leaf nestled amongst the green grass. The sunlight was catching it just perfectly, making its colors pop and highlighting all the intricate veins. It almost looked like it was glowing, a beautiful contrast against the dark background and the fresh green blades around it. It was such a small, peaceful moment, just pausing to appreciate the beauty of autumn in its details. These little moments really capture the essence of the changing season for me.

photos.caption: Sunset over the corn — Very Nice Stormy Sunset pictures
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this incredible golden field, possibly corn or another crop, glowing vibrantly under a really dramatic sky. The low sunlight was just catching the tops of the plants, making them almost shimmer against the dark, heavy clouds that stretched across the horizon. You can see a line of green trees in the distance, with a few hints of autumn colors starting to show. There are also some utility lines running across the top left of the frame, a subtle reminder of civilization in this otherwise natural and powerful scene. It felt like such a peaceful yet intense moment, with the light

photos.caption: House lit up — Very Nice Stormy Sunset pictures
photos.captionKii: I remember this beautiful, almost dramatic autumn scene during a drive. The trees and bushes were still so green, but you could see hints of fall colors starting to appear, especially with that incredible light. The sky looked like a storm was rolling in, with those deep blue-purple clouds, but the sun was still shining through, making the foliage glow. It was such a striking contrast. I was on a quiet, unpaved road, with a few houses tucked away behind the trees and utility poles running along the side. It was a peaceful moment, appreciating the changing seasons and the natural beauty around

photos.caption: imgp2267
photos.captionKii: What a fun night out with friends! Here are two guys smiling for the camera in what looks like a lively pub or bar. My friend on the right is rocking a white baseball cap with a red brim, glasses, and a red hockey jersey—definitely showing some team spirit or Canadian pride with that emblem! The guy in the middle, also wearing glasses, has a warm smile and is holding a glass of a dark beverage, probably a beer. You can see the brick wall and other patrons in the dimly lit background, setting a classic bar scene. It was great catching up and just enjoying the evening.

photos.caption: imgp2258
photos.captionKii: I remember being in what looks like a lecture hall or a conference room during this presentation. On the left, a man is actively filming the session with a large video camera on a tripod, which is pretty cool! There's a woman in a blue top presenting to the group, and everyone's seated, facing forward. We can see two screens displaying colorful, almost mythical-looking graphics, with a main blank screen in the center. The room has that classic institutional ceiling with lights and exposed elements, and there's a whiteboard on the side. It was clearly a formal event, likely educational or profe

photos.caption: imgp2249
photos.captionKii: Here's a fun shot from a night out at what looks like a pub or bar. My friend is smiling widely, raising a mug of beer in a sort of toast. I remember he was wearing this cool grey long-sleeve shirt that said 'Check This Out! Podcast' with a website. The background has some Bud Light signs, definitely giving off that classic bar vibe.

photos.caption: imgp2230 — Start of the trip
photos.captionKii: This photo captures a peaceful winter drive, looking out over a long, straight road with a clear double yellow line disappearing into the horizon. On either side, the fields are lightly dusted with snow, and bare trees stand tall under a bright, crisp blue sky. You can see the utility poles and lines running along the side, adding to that quiet, rural feel. I remember enjoying the calm, open road on this day.
